prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve the fault record, estimate downtime, create a corrective work order, and update its status to in-progress with the downtime noted.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "get_fault_record",
        "arguments": {
          "fault_id": "F001"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-86553c73933769ee",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-001",
          "fault_id": "F001",
          "fault_type": "Line Breakage",
          "location": "Substation Gamma",
          "voltage_v": 33000,
          "current_a": 235,
          "power_load_mw": 32.97,
          "temperature_c": 25.7,
          "wind_speed_kmh": 7.1,
          "weather_condition": "Windy",

          "component_health": "Normal",
          "duration_hrs": 3.1,
          "downtime_hrs": 7
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "estimate_downtime",

          "severity": "high",
          "fault_type": "Arc Discharge"
        },

          "fault_type": "Arc Discharge",
          "estimated_min_hours": 16,
          "estimated_max_hours": 48,
          "estimated_typical_hours": 24,

        }
      },
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-006",
          "issue_description": "Arc Discharge fault detected",
          "priority": "high",
          "fault_type": "Arc Discharge",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 24
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-a1815b65a1859ca8",
        "output": {
          "work_order_id": "WO-66EC2270",
          "transformer_id": "T-006",
          "issue_description": "Arc Discharge fault detected",
          "priority": "high",
          "fault_type": "Arc Discharge",
          "status": "in_progress",

      {

          "work_order_id": "WO-66EC2270",

          "estimated_downtime_hours": 24.0,

    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The fault details are retrieved from the fault record F001. The estimated downtime is calculated based on the fault severity and type. A corrective work order is opened for T-006 with the estimated downtime of 24 hours. The work order is then marked as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The fault details are retrieved from the fault record F001. The estimated downtime is calculated based on the fault severity and type. A corrective work order is opened for T-006 with the estimated downtime of 24 hours. The work order is then marked as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:

    "task_completion": false,

    "hallucinations": true,

}
